title: READY TO RENT - 211info
text: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY READY TO RENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an 18 hour class geared towards those who are working to overcome a bad rental history. The class covers key information for being a responsible and stable tenant. Participants explore screening barriers they may have and take steps to address those barriers. Upon completion, participants receive a certificate that can be presented to landlords when applying for housing. Certificates are valid for 18 months. Certificates can be used anywhere in Oregon. Landlords in Yamhill County are eligible to register for the Landlord Assurance Program which may cover damages, unpaid rent, or eviction costs if a Ready to Rent tenant vacates the unit, not in good standing, within 12 months of the move-in date. 135 NE Dunn Place Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Program is for people with poor/no credit, past evictions, no rental history, criminal history, and/or other screening barriers to rental housing and those who are low-income, at risk of homelessness, or currently homeless Hours: Varies Email (503) 883-4308 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Housing Specialist (503) 883-4308 Main phone (503) 883-4300 Call to pre-register Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to pre-register for next available class or more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Tenant Readiness Education Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - YAMHILL REGIONAL HOUSING CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
